scenarios.title: At a Café
scenarios.context_description: You are ordering a coffee and a croissant at a local café.

scenarios.title: Meeting a New Friend
scenarios.context_description: You meet someone at a park and introduce yourself.

scenarios.title: At the Grocery Store
scenarios.context_description: You are buying fruits, vegetables, and bread at a grocery store.

scenarios.title: Asking for Directions
scenarios.context_description: You are lost in the city and need to find the train station.

scenarios.title: At the Doctor's Office
scenarios.context_description: You have a headache and need to describe your symptoms to the doctor.

scenarios.title: Booking a Hotel Room
scenarios.context_description: You are calling a hotel to book a room for two nights.

scenarios.title: Job Interview
scenarios.context_description: You are answering basic questions about your experience and skills.

scenarios.title: Making a Complaint
scenarios.context_description: You received a broken item and need to return it at the store.
